heading: Edit the Partition on the Cloud Object Store
body:
You can't modify the partition fields or structure from the
Atlas UI or API (Application Programming Interface). However, you can manually migrate the data from
the cloud object storage using [$merge](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/merge), use
[$merge](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/merge) to rehydrate data back to Atlas cluster,
[Delete an Online Archive](delete-online-archive) the online archive, and then
create a new online archive for the collection with the desired
partition fields and structure.
